name: obsidian-weave
description: Smartly backup closed tabs to Obsidian with AI summaries and context linking.

scripts.build:tsc: npx tsc && cp -r manifest.json _locales icons data dist/ && cp PRIVACY.md dist/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ && cp src/popup/styles.css dist/popup/ && mkdir -p dist/dashboard && cp src/dashboard/dashboard.html dist/dashboard/ && cp src/dashboard/dashboard.css dist/dashboard/ && cp src/dashboard/models-dev-dialog.html dist/dashboard/ && cp src/dashboard/models-dev-dialog.css dist/dashboard/ && mkdir -p dist/privacy && cp src/privacy/privacy.html src/privacy/privacy.css dist/privacy/ && cp src/utils/trustDb/bloomfilter-vendor.mjs dist/utils/trustDb/bloomfilter-vendor.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const file='dist/content/loader.js'; let content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); content=content.replace(/export \\{\\};?\\s*$/m,''); fs.writeFileSync(file,content);"
scripts.update-tranco: npm run update-preset && npm run update-manifest
